input_registers.name: RoomTemperatureValue
input_registers.description: Temperatura zmierzona przez czujnik T4 (temperatura w pomieszczeniu).
input_registers.description_en: Temperature measured by T4 sensor (room temperature).

input_registers.name: LeadTemperatureValue
input_registers.description: Temperatura z czujnika wiodącego (MODBUS, ROOM, SUPPLY lub INTAKE — zależnie od ustawień).
input_registers.description_en: Temperature from lead sensor (MODBUS, ROOM, SUPPLY or INTAKE — depends on settings).

input_registers.name: IntakeTemperatureValue
input_registers.description: Temperatura zmierzona przez czujnik Ti3 (powietrze wlotowe).
input_registers.description_en: Temperature measured by Ti3 sensor (intake air).

input_registers.name: SupplyTemperatureValue
input_registers.description: Temperatura zmierzona przez czujnik T1 (powietrze wylotowe).
input_registers.description_en: Temperature measured by T1 sensor (supply air).

input_registers.name: HeaterTemperatureValue
input_registers.description: Temperatura zmierzona przez czujnik T2 (wymiennik wodny).
input_registers.description_en: Temperature measured by T2 sensor (water heat exchanger).

input_registers.name: FanEfficiencyValue
input_registers.description: Aktualna wydajność wentylatora.
input_registers.description_en: Current fan efficiency.

input_registers.name: DrainPumpAlarm
input_registers.description: Stan alarmu pompy skroplin.
input_registers.description_en: Drain pump alarm state.

input_registers.name: FilterWorkTime
input_registers.description: Czas pracy filtra. Czas rzeczywisty = 5 × wartość [min].
input_registers.description_en: Filter operating time. Actual value = 5 × register value [min].

input_registers.name: ValveHTValue
input_registers.description: Aktualny stan zaworu grzewczego (HT).
input_registers.description_en: Current heating valve (HT) state.

input_registers.name: ValveCLValue
input_registers.description: Aktualny stan zaworu chłodniczego (CL).
input_registers.description_en: Current cooling valve (CL) state.

input_registers.name: Smart1State
input_registers.description: Stan trybu SMART I — informacja czy tryb jest aktywny.
input_registers.description_en: SMART MODE I state — indicates whether mode is active.

input_registers.name: Smart2State
input_registers.description: Stan trybu SMART II — informacja czy tryb jest aktywny.
input_registers.description_en: SMART MODE II state — indicates whether mode is active.

input_registers.name: Smart3State
input_registers.description: Stan trybu SMART III — informacja czy tryb jest aktywny.
input_registers.description_en: SMART MODE III state — indicates whether mode is active.

input_registers.name: TechnologicalHeatAlarm
input_registers.description: Brak ciepła ze źródła zasilania.
input_registers.description_en: No heat from power source.

values.1: Alarm aktywny — brak ciepła ze źródła (ALARM)

values_en.1: Alarm active — no heat from source (ALARM)

input_registers.name: Smart2LowTempAlarm
input_registers.description: Alarm niskiej temperatury nawiewu — II stan.
input_registers.description_en: Low supply temperature alarm — state II.

input_registers.name: SupplyTemperatureValue2
input_registers.description: Temperatura powietrza wylotowego — dodatkowy odczyt (czujnik T1).
input_registers.description_en: Supply air temperature — additional reading (T1 sensor).

input_registers.name: HeaterTemperatureValue2
input_registers.description: Temperatura wymiennika wodnego — dodatkowy odczyt (czujnik T2).
input_registers.description_en: Heat exchanger temperature — additional reading (T2 sensor).

input_registers.name: IntakeTemperatureValue2
input_registers.description: Temperatura powietrza wlotowego — dodatkowy odczyt (czujnik T3).
input_registers.description_en: Intake air temperature — additional reading (T3 sensor).

input_registers.name: RoomTemperatureValue2
input_registers.description: Temperatura powietrza w pomieszczeniu — dodatkowy odczyt (czujnik T4).
input_registers.description_en: Room air temperature — additional reading (T4 sensor).

input_registers.name: InputDIState
input_registers.description: Stan wejścia cyfrowego DI.
input_registers.description_en: Digital input DI state.

input_registers.name: FanWorkTime
input_registers.description: Czas pracy wentylatora.
input_registers.description_en: Fan operating time.

input_registers.name: PreheatState
input_registers.description: Stan funkcji podgrzewania wstępnego.
input_registers.description_en: Preheat function state.

holding_registers_single.name: OnOff
holding_registers_single.description: Włącz/wyłącz urządzenie. Domyślnie OFF.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Turn device on/off. Default: OFF.

holding_registers_single.name: ManualWorkMode
holding_registers_single.description: Tryb pracy wentylatora. Domyślnie MANUAL.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Fan operating mode. Default: MANUAL.

holding_registers_single.name: DestratificationMode
holding_registers_single.description: Włącz/wyłącz tryb destratyfikacji. Aktywne gdy LowCeilingMode=OFF.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Enable/disable destratification mode. Active when LowCeilingMode=OFF.

holding_registers_single.name: LowCeilingMode
holding_registers_single.description: Włącz/wyłącz tryb niskiego sufitu.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Enable/disable low ceiling mode.

holding_registers_single.name: NozzleLvl
holding_registers_single.description: Ustawienie dyszy (5 kroków). Aktywne gdy ManualWorkMode=ON. Domyślnie 0%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Nozzle setting (5 steps). Active when ManualWorkMode=ON. Default: 0%.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode
holding_registers_single.description: Włącz/wyłącz tryb SMART. Aktywne gdy InputDIConfiguration=1 lub 2.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Enable/disable SMART mode. Active when InputDIConfiguration=1 or 2.

holding_registers_single.name: PreheatMode
holding_registers_single.description: Włącz/wyłącz podgrzewanie wstępne. Aktywne gdy ExchangerTypeConfiguration=0 lub 2.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Enable/disable preheat. Active when ExchangerTypeConfiguration=0 or 2.

holding_registers_single.name: FanManualLvl
holding_registers_single.description: Ręczna wydajność wentylatora. Aktywne gdy ManualWorkMode=1. Domyślnie 200 = 20%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Manual fan capacity. Active when ManualWorkMode=1. Default: 200 = 20%.

holding_registers_single.name: DestratificationTempRef
holding_registers_single.description: Różnica temperatur aktywująca destratyfikację: IntakeTemp − RoomTemp > wartość. Domyślnie 50 = 5.0°C.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Temperature difference to activate destratification: IntakeTemp − RoomTemp > value. Default: 50 = 5.0°C.

holding_registers_single.name: PreheatTempRef
holding_registers_single.description: Temperatura wymiennika po której włącza się wentylator (tryb grzania). Domyślnie 280 = 28.0°C.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Heat exchanger temperature threshold to start fan (heating mode). Default: 280 = 28.0°C.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode1TimeRef
holding_registers_single.description: Czas aktywacji warunku SMART MODE I. Domyślnie 1800s.
holding_registers_single.description_en: SMART MODE I activation time. Default: 1800s.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode2TimeRef
holding_registers_single.description: Czas aktywacji warunku SMART MODE II. Domyślnie 3600s.
holding_registers_single.description_en: SMART MODE II activation time. Default: 3600s.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode3TimeRef
holding_registers_single.description: Czas aktywacji warunku SMART MODE III. Domyślnie 7200s.
holding_registers_single.description_en: SMART MODE III activation time. Default: 7200s.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode2HysteresisHeat
holding_registers_single.description: Histereza temperatury dla grzania w SMART MODE II. Domyślnie 20 = 2.0°C.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Temperature hysteresis for heating in SMART MODE II. Default: 20 = 2.0°C.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode2HysteresisCool
holding_registers_single.description: Histereza temperatury dla chłodzenia w SMART MODE II. Domyślnie 20 = 2.0°C.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Temperature hysteresis for cooling in SMART MODE II. Default: 20 = 2.0°C.

holding_registers_single.name: SmartMode3TempMin
holding_registers_single.description: Minimalna temperatura dla SMART MODE III. Domyślnie 180 = 18.0°C.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Minimum temperature for SMART MODE III. Default: 180 = 18.0°C.

holding_registers_single.name: InputDiForce
holding_registers_single.description: Nadpisanie wejścia DI przez MODBUS. Aktywne gdy InputDIConfiguration=1 lub 2 i IR[0x0E]=1. Domyślnie 0.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Override DI input via MODBUS. Active when InputDIConfiguration=1 or 2 and IR[0x0E]=1. Default: 0.

holding_registers_single.name: DestratificationFanRef
holding_registers_single.description: Wydajność wentylatora w trybie destratyfikacji. Domyślnie 600 = 60%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Fan capacity in destratification mode. Default: 600 = 60%.

holding_registers_single.name: LowCeilingFanRef
holding_registers_single.description: Wydajność wentylatora w trybie niskiego sufitu. Domyślnie 600 = 60%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Fan capacity in low ceiling mode. Default: 600 = 60%.

holding_registers_single.name: LowCeilingLowLimit
holding_registers_single.description: Dolny limit wydajności wentylatora w trybie Low Ceiling. Domyślnie 0%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Lower fan capacity limit in Low Ceiling mode. Default: 0%.

holding_registers_single.name: LowCeilingHighLimit
holding_registers_single.description: Górny limit wydajności wentylatora w trybie Low Ceiling. Domyślnie 600 = 60%.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Upper fan capacity limit in Low Ceiling mode. Default: 600 = 60%.

holding_registers_single.name: InputDIConfiguration
holding_registers_single.description: Aktywacja i wybór polaryzacji wejścia DI.
holding_registers_single.description_en: DI input activation and polarity selection.

holding_registers_single.name: ActuatorsTimeConfiguration
holding_registers_single.description: Czas otwarcia siłownika 3-drogowego — zgodnie z danymi producenta. Domyślnie 150s.
holding_registers_single.description_en: 3-way actuator opening time — per manufacturer data. Default: 150s.

holding_registers_single.name: ExchangerTypeConfiguration
holding_registers_single.description: Typ wymiennika ciepła. Domyślnie 2.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Heat exchanger type. Default: 2.

holding_registers_single.name: ValveTypeConfiguration
holding_registers_single.description: Typ siłownika zaworu. Domyślnie 0.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Valve actuator type. Default: 0.

holding_registers_single.name: DrainPumpAlarmConfiguration
holding_registers_single.description: Polaryzacja styku alarmu pompy skroplin. Domyślnie 0.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Drain pump alarm contact polarity. Default: 0.

holding_registers_single.name: FilterMaxWorkTime
holding_registers_single.description: Maksymalny czas pracy filtra. Domyślnie 4000h.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Maximum filter operating time. Default: 4000h.

holding_registers_single.name: GroupTLeadSensorSelect
holding_registers_single.description: Wybór czujnika wiodącego grupy.
holding_registers_single.description_en: Group lead sensor selection.
